body.title: MemoryChannel + BRANCHIF trigger-target syntax (D295, D296)
body.result: MemoryChannel + BRANCHIF node_id#trigger syntax. 754 tests green.
body.description:
Two small changes:

1. Add MemoryChannel to emit_channels.py (D295): new EmitChannel named memory. key=memory_type (EPISODIC/PROCEDURAL/INTERPRETIVE/etc.), value=content string. Reads from basket: _mem_tags (list, default []), _mem_identity_weight (float, default 0.5), _mem_salience (float, default 0.5). Requires _cortex in basket — if absent log warning and return. Call cortex.store() or equivalent to deposit the memory. Register in get_registry().

2. BRANCHIF node_id#trigger_name syntax in node_executor.py (D296): when BRANCHIF fires, check if target contains #. If so split on first #: node_id=left, trigger_name=right. Set result.next_node=node_id and result.next_trigger=trigger_name. If no #, existing behaviour (next_node=target, next_trigger=None). Add next_trigger: Optional[str] = None field to ExecutionResult.

3. Update main.py traversal loop: when fetching next node, use _eng_result.next_trigger or __entry__ as the trigger passed to execute_node.

Files: wild_igor/igor/cognition/emit_channels.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/node_executor.py, wild_igor/igor/main.py. Inertia: LOW/LOW/MEDIUM. Read each file before editing. Add tests for both features. Run full test suite after.
